sharedRules.name: Doctrina Imperatives
sharedRules.description:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Doctrina Imperatives below. Until the end of the battle round, that Doctrina Imperative is active for your army, and all units from your  army that have the Doctrina Imperatives ability gain the relevant abilities shown below. 

PROTECTOR IMPERATIVE
■ Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [HEAVY] ability.
■ Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, if this unit is within your deployment zone, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. 

CONQUEROR IMPERATIVE
■ Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.
■ Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, if the target of that attack is within your opponent's deployment zone, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

characteristics.$text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn which it Fell Back, and each time this unit ends a Fall Back move select one enemy unit it started the turn within engagment range of. Roll 4D6, and for each 4+ that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle, at the start of your shooting phase, you may active this ability. If you do so, all ranged weapons equipped by this unit gain [SUSTAINED HITS 2] until the end of the battle round.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: In your fight phase, after this unit has fought, pick one unit that was hit by this unit's Gravition Hammers weapon. Roll a D6 for each remaining model in that unit, or 3D6 for every VEHICLE or MONSTER model (to a maximum of 6D6). For each roll above the target unit's SV value, that unit suffers a mortal wound.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this
model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: If a unit, excluding [VEHICLE] units, suffers any unsaved wounds from this models Karacnos Mortar Battery weapon, until the start of your next shooting phase that unit is Irradiated and has their toughness reduced by 1, and the strength of all melee weapons they are equipped with reduced by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: ANTI-INFANTRY 2+, BLAST, IGNORES COVER, INDIRECT FIRE, HEAVY
characteristics.name: Keywords

characteristics.$text:
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this
model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model may ignore any modifiers to it´s movement characteristic, advance rolls and charge rolls.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this
model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to this unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus model makes an attack that targets that unit, reroll a Hit roll of 1 and, if that attack has the [INDIRECT FIRE] ability, it does not suffer the penalty to the Hit roll for shooting at a target that is not visible to the attacking unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus Mechanicus Infantry models. Each Sicarian, Tech-Priest or Scyllax model takes up the space of 2 models. Thallax or Ursarax model takes up the space of 3 models.
This model cannot transport Kataphron, Myrmidon or Pteraxii models.
characteristics.name: Capacity

characteristics.$text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this bearer, but the bearer must halve its Transport Capacity.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of your command phase you may restore one damaged model in this unit to full wounds. If there are no damaged models in this unit you may instead restore one model to this unit with D3 wounds remaining.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of your command phase you may restore one damaged model in this unit to full wounds. If there are no damaged models in this unit you may instead restore one model to this unit with D3 wounds remaining.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While a model is leading this unit, that model has the [Feel no pain 4+] ability, and and improve their OC value of Scyllax models in this unit by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a Tech-Priest Enginseer model (a unit cannot have more than one Servitors unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This unit can be led by the following units:
■ Tech-priest Enginseer
■ Tech-priest Manipulus
■ Tech-priest Dominus
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
At the start of the first battle round choose one of the following abilties to be active for the unit this model is leading.
Pain Suppression Override: This unit gains the Feel no Pain 6+ ability.
Explorator Synaesthesis: This unit may re-roll advance and charge rolls Extinction Interlock: When a model in this unit makes an attack, it may re-re-roll a hit roll of 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: When this model suffers an unsaved wound, reduce the damage of the incoming attack to 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This unit can lead the following units:
- Secutarii Hoplites
- Secutarii Peltasts
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time a melee attack is allocated to a Secutarii Hoplite model in this unit, on an unmodified saving throw of 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after it has finished making its attacks.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: A model with the Leader ability that can be attached to a Skitarii Vanguard unit can also attach to this unit.
characteristics.name: Description

selectionEntries.name: Archeotech pistol & Alpha close combat weapon

characteristics.$text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer`s unit have the IGNORES COVER ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time you select the bearer`s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1 CP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy Infantry unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy
unit is blinded. While a unit is blinded, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: A model with the Leader ability that can be attached to a Skitarii Vanguard unit can also attach to this unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time you select the bearer`s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1 CP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While a Tech-priest is within 6" of any model in this unit, improve the Leadership value of this unit to 5+ and add 1 to it's Objective Control characteristic.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This unit's ranged attacks ignore cover, and you can ignore any or all modifers to hit rolls when making an attack with this unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, subtract 3 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle round, when damage from a ranged attack is allocated to this model, you may change the damage characteristic of that attack to 0 and instead this unit takes D3 mortal wounds.
characteristics.name: Description

selectionEntries.name: Sollex Pattern Heavy Lascannon with Graviton Pulse

characteristics.$text: You can target this unit with the Tank Shock Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.
